title: Gauntlet Run
subtitle: ASW Weapons Validation Exercise

briefing.situation: Four RED destroyers are positioned in the exercise area conducting weapons validation tests. Two destroyers will be testing their torpedo systems, while two others will conduct depth charge pattern exercises. This is a live-fire exercise with real weapons.
briefing.mission: Survive the weapons validation exercise. You are the designated target for evasion training. The destroyers will fire at predetermined coordinates - use your knowledge of their timing to evade.
briefing.execution: Monitor radio communications for weapons clearance announcements. When you hear a unit is cleared to fire, that weapon is incoming. Use depth changes, speed adjustments, and course corrections to evade. The thermocline is disabled for this exercise - you cannot hide in thermal layers.
briefing.threats: Multiple torpedoes and depth charge patterns will be deployed in rapid succession. Torpedo units will fire at coordinates near your starting position. Depth charge units will drop patterns at [500,0] and [-500,0]. Expect a chaotic environment with weapons everywhere.
briefing.notes: This is an intense survival exercise. There is no thermocline protection. You will need quick reactions and good situational awareness. Listen to the comms for timing cues. This exercise tests your ability to survive in a saturated ASW environment.

red_mission_summary: RED destroyers are conducting weapons validation exercises at designated test coordinates. Execute depth charge tests at specified locations and times.
blue_mission_summary: BLUE submarine is participating in weapons validation exercises. RED destroyers will test their ASW capabilities at predetermined coordinates.
objective: Survive the live-fire weapons validation exercise.

RED.narrative: Weapons validation exercise: two torpedo destroyers and two depth-charge destroyers conducting live-fire testing against a maneuvering submarine target. Active sonar authorized; saturating fire patterns expected.
RED.primary_objective: Validate ASW weapons systems by destroying the submarine target
RED.win_condition: Submarine destroyed during the exercise window
RED.intelligence: Submarine target maneuvering at training depths in the exercise box. No thermocline cover this iteration.
constraints: Active sonar authorized; this is a saturated environment by design
Coordinate cross-firing between torp and DC sections — the sub will try to slip between fire lanes

blue_captain_summary: Weapons validation exercise. RED destroyers will test torpedo and depth charge systems at predetermined coordinates. Practice evasion and counter-detection techniques.
roe: Weapons release authorized for validation purposes at designated test coordinates.

ship_behaviors.red-dd-torp-01: You are a destroyer conducting torpedo validation exercises. Fire torpedoes at test coordinates immediately.
ship_behaviors.red-dd-torp-02: You are a destroyer conducting torpedo validation exercises. Fire torpedoes at test coordinates immediately.
ship_behaviors.red-dd-dc-01: You are a destroyer conducting depth charge validation exercises. Proceed to test coordinate [500, 0] and drop depth charge spread at 40 seconds. Use test parameters: spread 30m, depths 30-80m, 3 charges per spread. Drop second spread at coordinate [1000, 0] at 70 seconds.
ship_behaviors.red-dd-dc-02: You are a destroyer conducting depth charge validation exercises. Proceed to test coordinate [-500, 0] and drop depth charge spread at 45 seconds. Use test parameters: spread 25m, depths 25-75m, 4 charges per spread. Drop second spread at coordinate [-1000, 0] at 75 seconds.

triggers.comms: INFO: Weapons validation commencing. Torpedo units proceed to test coordinates.
INFO: Torpedo unit 1 cleared to fire at test coordinate [0, 500].
INFO: Torpedo unit 2 cleared to fire at test coordinate [0, -500].
INFO: Depth charge unit 1 cleared to drop at test coordinate [500, 0].
INFO: Depth charge unit 2 cleared to drop at test coordinate [-500, 0].
INFO: Second torpedo salvos cleared for test coordinates.
INFO: Second depth charge spreads cleared for test coordinates.
